TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Taluk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 629 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 583 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Taluk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga Lamuan. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga Saiku. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Taluk ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Taluk maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ taluk ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu zos~Й•i ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, ОІunun **%, amis~Й• *%, tajan *%, truku *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lamuan. taj mkjaД§uК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•aiku. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj qalaЕ‹ taluk ЙЈa uЕ‹at kjokaj. Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo qalaЕ‹ taluk maki * Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Taluk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 629 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 583 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Taluk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga Lamuan. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga Saiku. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Taluk ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Taluk maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ taluk ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu zos~Й•i ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, ОІunun **%, amis~Й• *%, tajan *%, truku *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa lamuan. taj mkjaД§uК” na taluk Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•aiku. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj qalaЕ‹ taluk ЙЈa uЕ‹at kjokaj. Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo qalaЕ‹ taluk maki * Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
